title: Ubiquiti U6-Extender-EU - UniFi Access Point WiFi 6 Extender
description: The WiFi 6 Extender (U6 Extender) is a portable, plug-and-play WiFi 6 access point that can easily and instantly extend the wireless coverage of your home or office. The U6 Extender can be adapted to your network in minutes and centrally managed using either the UniFi Network web application or a mobile application. The U6 Extender is a small, sleek yet extremely powerful Dual-Band AP with support for the latest Wi-Fi 6 standard 802.11ax and is ideal for businesses and households. The modern… To use the U6 Extender wirelessly, the following requirements must be met: Wireless access points for the U6 Extender must be updated to version 6.0.11 or later Dream Machine (UDM) must be updated to version 1.12.X Dream Router (UDR) must be updated to version 2.3.15 or later Wi-Fi 6 technology - 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax 5GHz throughput up to 4,800 Mbps - 160 MHz, 4Ã4 MIMO 2.4GHz throughput up to 574 Mbps - 2Ã2 MIMO Power supply directly from the socket - 230V AC (EU socket) Easily extends wireless coverage in large homes or offices WPA3 encryption support Supported by UniFi Network version 6.5.55 and later To manage the device, you need to download the original software called UniFi Network Controller from the official website, which allows you to control the entire network. The undeniable advantage of UniFi Controller is that it is completely free without any restrictions ! This central management allows you to upload maps and set basic parameters as well as advanced functions such as SSID, guest account, home page, traffic statistics and list and status of associated clients always…
